g.text: │ PRISM — a multitask morning with Maya (all local, 127.0.0.1) │
# 1) Decide — an interpretable call, not a black box
should Arsenal beat Chelsea this weekend?
prism ◂ Arsenal win (conf 32%) · key factors: home_form, away_form, home_advantage
# 2) Same engine, life-or-death domain — medical triage spectrum
triage: chest tightness, short of breath
prism ◂ recommend Emergency_AE (fulcrum 0.78) → next: Emergency_AE, 999, AE_4hr
# 3) Quick utilities, no LLM needed (deterministic organ routing)
search the web for python asyncio best practices
Web Search — Search results for: python asyncio best practices 1. Python's asyncio: A Hands-
On Walkthrough - Real Python https://realpython.com/async-io-python/ Explore how Python asyncio work
# 5) A sensitive action — human-in-the-loop approval gate
send an email to coach@club.com about Saturday's lineup
Approval required — high risk Run email_send for: send an email to coach@club.com about Satu
rday's lineup Why I'm asking: Action is irreversible once taken · Uses capability: internet_write ·
(PRISM pauses for explicit approval before any irreversible action)
add a task to review the scouting report
Task added — Added: add a task to review the scouting report
Tasks (2) · local — · add a task to review the scouting report · add a task to review the sc
# 7) Borrow a capability — import an Organ Pack, then use it instantly
import this shout-pack a friend shared
✔ decide · triage · convert · research · gate · do · borrow · know — one session, all on-device.
